This paper introduces MIXAR, the first generative pixel-based language model trained on eight different languages utilizing a range of different scripts. papers.summary_zh: Pixel-based 語言模型作為傳統 token-based 方法的替代方案正日益受到關注，有望解決 tokenization 的挑戰。然而，語言之間固有的感知多樣性對 pixel space 中的多語言泛化構成了重大障礙。本文介紹了 MIXAR，這是第一個在八種不同語言（使用多種不同文字）上訓練的生成式 pixel-based 語言模型。我們根據先前的 pixel-based 模型對 MIXAR 進行了實證評估。

papers.summary: To identify safety violations, auditors often search over large sets of agent traces. This search is difficult because failures are often rare, complex, and sometimes even adversarially hidden and only detectable when multiple traces are analyzed together. radar.summary_zh: LLM-assisted software development 已變得越來越普遍，並且能夠生成大型系統，例如 compilers。強化生成程式碼的正確性變得至關重要。然而，由於程式碼複雜性，針對大型系統的 automated reasoning 仍然具有挑戰性。Hoare logic 提供了一種將大型系統分解為更小組件並獨立推理它們的方法（即 compositional reasoning）。然而，現有的工作仍然難以擴展。
radar.title: FM-Agent: Scaling Formal Methods to Large Systems via LLM-Based Hoare-Style Reasoning
radar.title_zh: FM-Agent：透過基於 LLM 的 Hoare-Style 推理將形式化方法擴展到大型系統

links.title: CLAY: Conditional Visual Similarity Modulation in Vision-Language Embedding Space

primary_link.title: CLAY: Conditional Visual Similarity Modulation in Vision-Language Embedding Space

radar.summary: Human perception of visual similarity is inherently adaptive and subjective, depending on the users' interests and focus. However, most image retrieval systems fail to reflect this flexibility, relying on a fixed, monolithic metric that cannot incorporate multiple conditions simultaneously. To address this, we propose CLAY, an adaptive similarity computation method that reframes the embedding space of pretrained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) as a text-conditional similarity space without additio
radar.summary_zh: 人類對視覺相似性的感知本質上是自適應和主觀的，取決於使用者的興趣和關注點。然而，大多數 image retrieval 系統未能反映這種靈活性，它們依賴於固定、單一的 metric，無法同時納入多個條件。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了 CLAY，這是一種 adaptive similarity computation 方法，它將 pretrained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) 的 embedding space 重新建構為一個 text-conditional similarity space，而無需額外。
radar.title: CLAY: Conditional Visual Similarity Modulation in Vision-Language Embedding Space
radar.title_zh: CLAY：視覺語言嵌入空間中的條件式視覺相似性調變
